ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label of the size (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size is intended (e.g., Male, Female, Unisex) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of clothing (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regional_sizes" (
  "regional_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regional size entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size from the sizes table */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region associated with the sizing standard (e.g., AUS, US, UK) */,
  "size_num" INTEGER /* Numeric equivalent of the size in the respective region */,
  "size_label_region" TEXT /* Regional label for the size (e.g., 'Size 4' for AUS) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the regional size mapping was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the regional size mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regional_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regional_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size from the sizes table */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Hips measurement in centimeters */,
  "shoulder" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement in centimeters */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement in centimeters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size from the sizes table */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being tracked */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock for the specified size */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold at which a reorder should be triggered */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory entry was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the inventory entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., tops, bottoms) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand associated with the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product sold */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the product sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase (if available) */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the sale occurred (if applicable) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale was recorded in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, inventory manager, data analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Recommended size for the user */,
  "recommended_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the recommendation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user whose measurements are stored */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement of the user */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement of the user */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Hips measurement of the user */,
  "shoulder" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement of the user */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement of the user */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_measurements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size being analyzed */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total sales associated with the size */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average customer rating for the size */,
  "total_returns" INTEGER /* Total number of returns for the size */,
  "return_rate" REAL /* Return rate for the size */,
  "analytics_date" TEXT /* Date when the analytics were recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics entry was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the analytics entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return transaction */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the original sale entry */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the return was processed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the return (if available) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount refunded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the return was processed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
